svg.title: AI Scientist — System Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from hypothesis input through 4 agents to experiment plan output
svg.text: Sigma L6876 · L. rhamnosus GG · 5×10⁸ CFU
Wk1: Setup · Wk2–5: Treatment · Wk6: Analysis
Inline annotation · Feedback store · Few-shot loop
Each agent stage emits progress events.
UI updates live — no polling needed.
Stage badge lights up as it completes.
